# /launch — this repo's launch kit, generated by its own skills

Radical dogfooding: the launch plan for shipping-skills was produced by running the repo's own skills against the repo.

| File | Produced by |
|------|-------------|
| [product-context.md](product-context.md) | `product-context` — the base context the other skills read |
| [directory-kit.md](directory-kit.md) | `directory-submissions` — assets, tiered targets, 30-day calendar |
| [community-kit.md](community-kit.md) | `community-launch` — communities, schedule, post drafts, response protocol |

If you're evaluating whether these skills are worth installing: this directory is the output quality you can expect, applied to a real launch. Diff the eventual public posts against these drafts if you like — they should match.
